LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.description: Create hot sauce from peppers. A potent, spicy sauce made from blending and simmering chilis and other spices. While particularly strong hot sauces hurt at first, they are known to numb pain and work up a warm sweat shortly after consumption.
LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.label: make hot sauce
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.description: Create ketchup from tomatoes. A thick sauce made from stewing tomatoes, both salty and tangy in tandem with a sweet aftertaste. Perfect for meaty meals or fried foods.
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.label: make ketchup
